name: Demo Auth Provider
description: DEMO ONLY — shows how an auth provider module declares its connector requirements. Contains no real auth logic.

connectors.name: oauth_provider
connectors.description: OAuth 2.0 provider endpoint (e.g. Google, GitHub). Injected at runtime by Morphius Connect.

secretRefs.name: OAUTH_CLIENT_ID
secretRefs.description: OAuth client ID — declared here by name only, real value lives in Morphius Connect

secretRefs.name: OAUTH_CLIENT_SECRET
secretRefs.description: OAuth client secret — declared here by name only, real value lives in Morphius Connect

actions.name: Start Auth Flow
actions.description: Returns a mock auth URL. Real implementation would use injected connector values.

actions.name: Exchange Code
actions.description: Exchanges an auth code for a token. MOCK in this demo.

eventsEmitted.name: auth:login
eventsEmitted.description: Fired when a user successfully authenticates

author: Morphius Forge Example
